{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Arelius family elders
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The elders of the [[Arelius family]] can rein in the Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Arelius family elders]] were displeased with [[Eithan]]'s handling of recent matters, specifically [[Lindon]]'s lost duel.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
